items.title: D-backs fall as Marte fails to challenge game-ending strike 3
items.summary: The D-backs' Ketel Marte failed to challenge a called strike three for the final out in Friday's 5-4 loss to the Cardinals, though replays showed the pitch was high and out of the strike zone.

items.title: Andrés Chaparro racks up 8 RBIs as Nationals hand A's their 10th straight loss with 23-4 rout
items.summary: — Andrés Chaparro went 4 for 5 with two home runs and eight RBI as the Washington Nationals handed the Athletics their 10th straight defeat in a 23-4 romp Friday night.

items.title: 2026 MLB ABS challenge system tracker: Team, player rankings
items.summary: The ABS challenge system leaderboard ranks batters, catchers, teams and umpires throughout the MLB season.

items.title: Adames hits 7th career grand slam and Roupp goes 7 innings as Giants blank Mariners 7-0
items.summary: — Willy Adames hit his seventh career grand slam, Bryce Eldridge smacked a two-run homer and Landen Roupp threw seven sharp innings as the San Francisco Giants beat the Seattle Mariners 7-0 on Friday night in their first game after the All-Star break.
